description: Writing Dockerfiles and Docker Compose configurations to containerize applications
example_requests: create a Dockerfile for a Node.js Express application
write a Docker Compose setup for a web app with a database
build a multi-stage Dockerfile for a Go application
set up a Docker development environment with hot reloading

questions.question: What type of application are you containerizing?
What base image strategy should be used?
options: Custom base image — I will specify

questions.question: Should a multi-stage build be used?
options: Yes — separate build stage and runtime stage (smaller final image)
Not applicable (interpreted language, no build step)

questions.question: What ports need to be exposed?
options: No ports — batch job or worker process

questions.question: Does the container need persistent data storage?
How should environment configuration be handled?
Is a Docker Compose file needed alongside the Dockerfile?
options: Yes — include docker-compose.yml with all services
Yes — with a database service (Postgres / MySQL / Redis)
